assertionResults.fullName: Group flows with Firebase-backed data Remove member flow shows the members list and the removable member
assertionResults.title: shows the members list and the removable member

assertionResults.fullName: Group flows with Firebase-backed data Remove member flow removes Person 3 from the group
assertionResults.title: removes Person 3 from the group

assertionResults.fullName: Group flows with Firebase-backed data Remove member flow prevents removing the current user
assertionResults.title: prevents removing the current user

assertionResults.fullName: Group flows with Firebase-backed data Remove member flow prevents removing a member with unsettled balance
assertionResults.title: prevents removing a member with unsettled balance

assertionResults.fullName: Group flows with Firebase-backed data Leave group flow allows a member with settled balances to leave
assertionResults.title: allows a member with settled balances to leave

assertionResults.fullName: Group flows with Firebase-backed data Leave group flow prevents leaving when balances are unsettled
assertionResults.title: prevents leaving when balances are unsettled

assertionResults.fullName: Group flows with Firebase-backed data Delete group flow allows the owner to delete a settled group
assertionResults.title: allows the owner to delete a settled group

assertionResults.fullName: Group flows with Firebase-backed data Delete group flow prevents deleting a group with unsettled balances
assertionResults.title: prevents deleting a group with unsettled balances

assertionResults.fullName: Feature: View group balances Scenario: Given the active group has expenses, When the dashboard is opened, Then the current balance panel shows the user's net balance and the settlement needed to square the group
assertionResults.title: Scenario: Given the active group has expenses, When the dashboard is opened, Then the current balance panel shows the user's net balance and the settlement needed to square the group

assertionResults.fullName: Feature: View group balances Scenario: Given the active group has an expense, When the expense amount is edited, Then the dashboard recalculates the net balance and settlement instruction from the updated amount
assertionResults.title: Scenario: Given the active group has an expense, When the expense amount is edited, Then the dashboard recalculates the net balance and settlement instruction from the updated amount

assertionResults.fullName: Feature: View group balances Scenario: Given a newly created group has no expenses, When it becomes active, Then the dashboard hides the balance panel because there is no debt to summarize
assertionResults.title: Scenario: Given a newly created group has no expenses, When it becomes active, Then the dashboard hides the balance panel because there is no debt to summarize

ancestorTitles: Feature: Identify who paid for an expense
assertionResults.fullName: Feature: Identify who paid for an expense Scenario: Given the user is adding an expense, When they select a payer, Then the saved expense names that payer and does not show a missing-payer validation error
assertionResults.title: Scenario: Given the user is adding an expense, When they select a payer, Then the saved expense names that payer and does not show a missing-payer validation error

ancestorTitles: Feature: Identify who paid for an expense
assertionResults.fullName: Feature: Identify who paid for an expense Scenario: Given an existing expense has a payer, When the payer is changed while editing, Then the expenses list reflects the new payer for that existing expense
assertionResults.title: Scenario: Given an existing expense has a payer, When the payer is changed while editing, Then the expenses list reflects the new payer for that existing expense

assertionResults.fullName: Feature: Join a group Scenario: Given another group is active, When the user enters an existing invite code, Then the app switches them into the invited group and confirms the join
assertionResults.title: Scenario: Given another group is active, When the user enters an existing invite code, Then the app switches them into the invited group and confirms the join

assertionResults.fullName: Feature: Edit an expense Scenario: Given a saved expense exists, When the user edits and saves it, Then the expenses list shows the corrected details and no longer shows the outdated entry
assertionResults.title: Scenario: Given a saved expense exists, When the user edits and saves it, Then the expenses list shows the corrected details and no longer shows the outdated entry

assertionResults.fullName: Feature: Create a group Scenario: Given the user wants a new group, When they submit a group name, Then the app activates that group, gives the user a share code, and starts with no balance summary
assertionResults.title: Scenario: Given the user wants a new group, When they submit a group name, Then the app activates that group, gives the user a share code, and starts with no balance summary

assertionResults.fullName: Feature: Validate and calculate expenses Scenario: Given expense details contain a blank or negative amount, When the expense is validated, Then the user receives an amount-specific validation message
assertionResults.title: Scenario: Given expense details contain a blank or negative amount, When the expense is validated, Then the user receives an amount-specific validation message

assertionResults.fullName: Feature: Validate and calculate expenses Scenario: Given participant percentages add up to less than 100, When the expense is validated, Then the user receives a split-total validation message
assertionResults.title: Scenario: Given participant percentages add up to less than 100, When the expense is validated, Then the user receives a split-total validation message

assertionResults.fullName: Feature: Validate and calculate expenses Scenario: Given valid expense details, When an expense entry is created, Then the saved expense contains normalized numeric values and selected participants only
assertionResults.title: Scenario: Given valid expense details, When an expense entry is created, Then the saved expense contains normalized numeric values and selected participants only

assertionResults.fullName: Feature: Validate and calculate expenses Scenario: Given one member paid for a shared expense, When balances and settlements are calculated, Then the payer is credited, the participant is debited, and the settlement clears the debt
assertionResults.title: Scenario: Given one member paid for a shared expense, When balances and settlements are calculated, Then the payer is credited, the participant is debited, and the settlement clears the debt

assertionResults.fullName: Feature: Validate and calculate expenses Scenario: Given the current member both paid for and benefited from shared expenses, When their debt breakdown is calculated, Then covered amounts are marked positive and amounts owed to others are marked negative
assertionResults.title: Scenario: Given the current member both paid for and benefited from shared expenses, When their debt breakdown is calculated, Then covered amounts are marked positive and amounts owed to others are marked negative
